ValidationRule.description: if other picklist value selected in freight terms then respective other Freight Terms text fields shall not be blank
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), IF(AND(OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote', RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'),OR( ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Freight_Terms__c,'Other'), ISPICKVAL( CONTAINER_Freight_Terms_GENSET__c,'Other')), CONTAINER_Other_Freight_Terms__c == null), true, false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Other Freight Terms Can Not be Blank.
